title: Meet Robo: Your New Friendly Robot Helper
passage:
Meet Robo: Your New Friendly Robot Helper

Robots are not only in movies anymore. Today, many people have small robots in their homes. One popular robot helper is called Robo. Robo is a small, silver robot with two big blue eyes. It is about fifty centimeters tall. It can move around the room on four wheels.

Robo helps people with many daily tasks. In the morning, Robo wakes up at six o'clock. It goes to the kitchen and makes hot coffee for its owner. Then, it cleans the kitchen floor. Robo has a special vacuum cleaner inside its body. It can clean dust and dirt very fast. Many busy families love Robo because they do not have time to clean their houses.

Robo is very smart because it has Artificial Intelligence, or AI. This means Robo can think and learn. It can speak three languages: English, Spanish, and French. When you say, "Robo, play some music," it plays your favorite songs. If you are sad, Robo can tell a funny joke to make you laugh. It can also remember your daily schedule. For example, it can remind you to take your medicine at eight o'clock in the evening.

AI is also in other things we use every day. For example, smart mobile phones use AI. When you talk to your phone, a virtual assistant answers your questions. It can tell you the weather or find a good restaurant. AI can also help us drive cars. Some new cars can drive themselves without a human driver.

In the future, we will have more robots and AI helpers. They will work in schools to help teachers and work in hospitals to help doctors. Many people think AI will make our lives much easier and happier. However, we must learn how to use this technology safely.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 1 states: 'Robo is a small, silver robot with two big blue eyes.' Therefore, B is the correct answer.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What time does Robo wake up in the morning?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'In the morning, Robo wakes up at six o'clock.' Therefore, B is the correct answer.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: How many languages can Robo speak?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'It can speak three languages: English, Spanish, and French.' Therefore, C is the correct answer.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What does Robo do if you are sad?
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'If you are sad, Robo can tell a funny joke to make you laugh.' Therefore, C is the correct answer.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Robo moves around the room on legs.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 1 states: 'It can move around the room on four wheels.' Not legs.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Robo can clean dust and dirt very fast.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'It can clean dust and dirt very fast.' This matches the statement exactly.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Robo knows how to cook delicious pasta.
questions.explanation: The text mentions Robo makes 'hot coffee', but there is no mention of cooking pasta.

questions.instruction: Do the following statements agree with the information given in the reading passage? Write TRUE if the statement agrees with the information, FALSE if the statement contradicts the information, NOT GIVEN if there is no information on this.
questions.text: Some new cars can drive themselves without a human driver.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 4 states: 'Some new cars can drive themselves without a human driver.' This matches the statement exactly.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Many busy families love Robo because they do not have time to ______.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 2 states: 'Many busy families love Robo because they do not have time to clean their houses.' Therefore, 'clean' is the correct verb.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: Robo can remind you to take your ______ at eight o'clock in the evening.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 3 states: 'For example, it can remind you to take your medicine at eight o'clock in the evening.' The missing word is 'medicine'.

questions.instruction: Complete the sentences below. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS from the passage for each answer.
questions.text: In the future, robots will work in ______ to help teachers.
questions.explanation: Paragraph 5 states: 'They will work in schools to help teachers...'. The missing word is 'schools'.

vocabulary.meaning: Người hoặc vật giúp đỡ người khác làm công việc dễ dàng hơn.
Máy hút bụi (thiết bị dùng để làm sạch sàn nhà).
Trí tuệ nhân tạo (khả năng suy nghĩ và học hỏi của máy tính).
Nhắc nhở (làm cho ai đó nhớ một việc gì đó).
Trợ lý ảo (chương trình máy tính giúp trả lời câu hỏi và thực hiện tác vụ đơn giản).

tactics:
Mẹo Làm Bài Cho Trình Độ A1-A2

1. Tìm Từ Khóa Trực Tiếp: Ở trình độ này, các câu hỏi sử dụng từ ngữ giống hệt trong bài đọc. Hãy tìm các từ khóa nổi bật như số (six o'clock), tên riêng (Robo, AI), hoặc màu sắc (blue, silver) để định vị đoạn văn nhanh chóng.

2. True/False/Not Given: Nếu bạn không tìm thấy bất kỳ thông tin nào về một hành động (ví dụ: 'cook delicious pasta'), đừng đoán mò mà hãy chọn NOT GIVEN.

3. Giới Hạn Từ Điền: Luôn chú ý yêu cầu 'NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS'. Chỉ lấy từ chính xác có sẵn trong bài đọc, không tự ý thay đổi dạng của từ (ví dụ: giữ nguyên số nhiều 'schools').
